output_files: D:/Work/Saed Tantawy/RS/MATRIAL 2026/Montage/p3/محمد ريان - ورشة الشامل - phase7-full.mp4
projects.overall_note: المستخدم قال 'تمام كويس هنبدأ نحسن في الفترة الجاية أكتر' على الـ full render. اعتبرها baseline جيد + فيه room لتحسين الـ scenes في الـ iteration الجاي.

feedback.note: 'Word pop بيحصلها زي Overlap وبتغطي علي الكابشن' — الـ floating pill الأصلية كانت بتتعارض مع الـ lower-third والكابشنز. Omar طلب 'نشيله خالص أفضل ونستبدله بحاجه أذكي'.
feedback.action_taken: حذفنا WordPop.tsx نهائياً. استبدلناه بـ in-caption word boost — الـ WordCaption بتقبل emphasisTimes prop وبتكبّر الكلمة الـ active 1.28x + glow أقوى لما في emphasis beat. zero collision. Omar approved: 'تمام احسن'.

feedback.note: الـ replacement للـ WordPop. الكلمة اللي المحاضر بيقولها في اللحظة بتتعمل pop inside the caption itself.
feedback.action_taken: الـ pattern ده أصبح الـ default لأي retention rhythm. saved as feedback_inline_emphasis_pattern.md memory.

feedback.note: 'محتاج انيميشنز احسن وخلي ال Anchor point بتاعتك في نص الشاشة بالظبط' — كان top-anchored بـ title عند y=300 والـ cards تحتها، اللي ساب النص السفلي فاضي.
feedback.action_taken: أعدنا بناء كل scenes الـ 4 بـ vertical centering (flexbox justifyContent: center + paddingTop 280 لـ logo clearance). أضفنا animations أغنى: spring bounce بدل fade + scale 0.85→1.0 + rotation subtle + continuous pulse glow على الـ current/accent elements + background shimmer. saved as feedback_scene_layout.md.

feedback.note: 'اه لازم اللوجو يظهر' — Omar رفض سلوك الـ brand spec الأصلي اللي بيخفي اللوجو أثناء الـ scenes.
feedback.action_taken: حذفنا SceneAwareLogoBug. اللوجو بقى في z-index 1000 فوق كل الـ scenes و بيفضل ظاهر طول الوقت. الـ scenes كلها بتسيب paddingTop 280 عشان الـ title ما يتعارضش مع اللوجو. updated brands/rs/BRAND.md. saved as feedback_logo_visible_in_scenes.md.

feedback.note: 'خليها تحت أو فوق مكان الكابشنز أفضل' — Omar رفض وضع الـ overlays في top-center (كانوا بيتنافسوا مع الوش للانتباه).
feedback.action_taken: نقلنا tokens.overlays.defaultY من 280 لـ 1140 (بس المستوى/stamp at 1180). حدّثنا y_px في animation_plan.json لكل الـ 5 overlays. saved as feedback_overlay_position.md.

feedback.element_name: WordPop at y=1180 colliding with lower-third
feedback.note: Omar أرسل screenshot يوضح إن الـ WordPop كان بيتعارض مع الـ 'محمد ريان' lower-third bar (y=1100-1280). الـ WordPop كان في y=1180 = middle of lower-third.
feedback.action_taken: قبل ما نحذف الـ WordPop، كنا هننقله لـ y=900 (body zone). بس Omar طلب replacement أذكى، فحذفناه خالص. learned: 9:16 safe zones table — body zone y=700-1090 هو الوحيد الآمن لـ small overlays. saved as feedback_safe_zones.md.

feedback.note: Omar ملاحظة مهمة: 'طبيعة الريلز ان مهم يكون في حاجة بتحصل كل 4 ثواني مثلا عشان المشاهد ميملش فازاي نظبط حاجة زي كدا؟' — الـ cadence الأصلي كان 15s/event (من Phase 6 لوحده)، بعيد جداً عن الـ reels rule.
feedback.action_taken: بنينا Phase 6.5: micro-events generator + 3-tier event system. من 14 event (Phase 6) لـ 43 event (Phase 6 + 6.5) = cadence من 15s لـ 4.86s. أقرب للـ target 4s. أضفنا 3 micro components (CaptionUnderline + AccentFlash + in-caption word boost) + VideoBreathing (Tier 3 continuous motion).

feedback.note: 'تمام كويس هنبدأ نحسن في الفترة الجاية أكتر' — Omar approved as baseline. فيه room للتحسين على الـ scenes individually.
feedback.action_taken: Baseline محفوظ. الـ Next Up في CLAUDE.md بيشير لـ iteration polish على الـ scenes والـ caption styles الجديدة في الـ session الجاية.

projects.project: المحاسب الشامل - محمد ريان - اسئلة ما بعد المحاضرة

pipeline.phase_3: approved in subtitle editor after VideoPlayer fix
pipeline.phase_6: auto (Claude Code in-context) — initially with caption_style_ranges, reverted to single style
pipeline.phase_7: 2 render passes (v1 had 2 scene bugs, v2 fixed)

output_files: D:/Work/Saed Tantawy/RS/MATRIAL 2026/Montage/p4/Video 2/المحاسب الشامل - محمد ريان - اسئلة ما بعد المحاضرة-reel.mp4
projects.overall_note: First pass (v1) = 2/5 — 2 scene rendering bugs + mixed captions felt distracting. Second pass (v2) = 3.5/5 after bug fixes and caption revert. Good baseline for future short reels. Omar flagged black-frame-at-start as a systemic issue for the next video.

feedback.element_name: BigMetaphorScene v1 — headline clipped at top, subline dim
feedback.note: Screenshot: 'معايير العرض الكاملة' was rendering at the very top of the frame (not centered), partially clipped. The subline was dim. Cause: the <Trail> wrapper from @remotion/motion-blur breaks flex layout — the child takes zero flex-box height so flex centering collapses. Decorative 9-point star shape also looked weird floating in the middle.
feedback.action_taken: Rewrote BigMetaphorScene using absolute positioning: headline centered at y=900, subline at y=1120, footer at y=1560. Removed Trail wrapper entirely. Removed 9-point star decoration, kept only the dashed circle. Animations still layered (scale + rotate + pulse glow + impact burst).

feedback.note: Screenshot: the 3 labels ('قوائم مالية', 'ميزان مراجعة', 'شجرة حسابات') were rendering stacked on top of each other in a jumble under the nodes. Cause: gap=90 + each label was constrained to width=nodeSize=120 with whiteSpace:nowrap. Arabic text at 48px/800 is ~300-400px wide, so labels overflowed their container and collided.
feedback.action_taken: Increased gap to 230 (totalWidth 820, fits inside safe area). Gave each label its own absolute container with width = nodeSize + gap - 20 = 330px, centered on the node. Allowed text to wrap if needed. Updated ProcessTimelineScene.tsx structure (React.Fragment instead of wrapping div).

feedback.note: Omar said 'لا خلتها مزعجة خلينا بستايل واحد أفضل' (no, they made it distracting — one style is better). Contradicts my initial read of his request 'استخدم أكتر من استايل بذكاء' — he meant visual variety in scenes/overlays, not caption renderer switching.
feedback.action_taken: Removed caption_style_ranges from animation_plan.json. Kept single caption_style: 'hormozi'. NEW RULE saved to style_evolution.md + memory: single caption style per reel unless Omar explicitly asks for mixing.

feedback.element_name: Source video opens with 1 black frame
feedback.note: Omar: 'اول كام فريم بيبقي شاشة سوداء دي محتاجين نعالجها' — source MP4 starts with a single black frame (blackdetect: black_start:0 black_end:0.033s = exactly 1 frame at 30fps). Visible at the start of every reel.
feedback.action_taken: Added detectLeadingBlack(videoPath) helper to rs-reels.mjs that runs blackdetect on the first 3s. prepareVideo() now passes -ss <end> to ffmpeg when leading black is found, trimming both video and audio in the scaled file. Refactored preprocessAudio to accept scaled video as input so .wav is cut from the trimmed file — keeps captions/energy/face_map in sync with the trimmed timeline. Phase 9 v2 render NOT retriggered for this video (Omar said 'للفيديوهات اللي بعد كدا').

feedback.element_name: VideoPlayer useEffect missing videoUrl in deps
feedback.note: Omar: 'الـ Active caption مش بيمشي تلقائيا مع الصوت حتي لو شغلت ال Follow toggle'. Cause: VideoPlayer.tsx had an effect attaching play/pause/time listeners on the <video>, but deps were only stable setter refs. On first render videoUrl was null → component returned null → effect early-returned with videoRef.current=null. On second render (when URL params loaded), the <video> mounted but the effect didn't re-run so listeners never attached.
feedback.action_taken: Added videoUrl to the effect's deps in subtitle-editor/src/components/VideoPlayer.tsx. Now the effect re-runs when videoUrl becomes set, attaching the listeners to the newly-mounted <video>. HMR picked it up immediately.

feedback.note: Scene density felt right for the content — 15s-avg spacing worked. No Omar complaint on count.
feedback.action_taken: Confirms the 15s spacing rule from docs/scene-validation-rules.md. For reels <90s: aim for 3-4 scenes.

pipeline.phase_2: done (faster-whisper, 54 segments, 0 Egyptian fixes needed — transcribe.js exited with STATUS_STACK_BUFFER_OVERRUN post-write, captions still saved correctly)

output_files: D:/Work/Saed Tantawy/RS/MATRIAL 2026/Montage/p4/Video 3/المحاسب الشامل محمد ريان - من فعاليات المحاضرة-reel.mp4
projects.overall_note: 'تمام كويس لحد دلوقتي' + 'هنبدأ نحسن الفترة الجاية ونقوي الأنميشنز أكتر وننوعها بس حاليا كله مقبول' — Omar approved as acceptable baseline. Flagged animation polish + variety as the focus for the next session. Outro got a significant redesign mid-session (CTA + website + social icons) and was approved.

feedback.note: Omar: 'هل نقدر لما ادوس Approve ينزلو في مكان تقرأهم Automatic بسرعة عشان نسرع العملية؟' — the download-to-Downloads-then-manually-move flow was slowing each run.
feedback.action_taken: Added writable routes to startFileServer in rs-reels.mjs: POST /save/captions.json and POST /save/captions.srt write the request body directly to the destination paths next to the source video. runEdit passes saveBase=http://127.0.0.1:7777 in the editor URL. Toolbar.handleApprove now POSTs both JSON+SRT in parallel when saveBase is present, falling back to download if not (so direct editor use still works). Confirmed working: both files landed at correct paths in one click.

feedback.element_name: Outro with CTA + website + social icons
feedback.note: Omar: 'محتاج اضيف في الفوتر ايكونز انستاجرام وفيسبوك وتيكتوك ولينكد ان ويتويب وفوقيها لينك الويبسايت بتاعنا rspaac.com وكمان نضيف CTA في الاخر ان المتدرب يقدر يحجز من خلال تواصل عبر رسائل الصفحة مباشرةً او من خلال موقعنا الالكتروني'. Previous outro was just logo + tagline at 2.5s — too thin to monetize the closing seconds of a reel.
feedback.action_taken: Extended outro duration 2.5s → 5s. Added tokens.outro fields: website, ctaPrimary, ctaSubtext, socialIconSize, socialIconGap. Created SocialIcons.tsx with CC0 simple-icons paths for Instagram, Facebook, TikTok, LinkedIn, YouTube. Rewrote Outro.tsx with absolute positioning + staggered cascade animation: logo (spring 0-15) → tagline → CTA primary → CTA subtext → website → social icons row (4-frame stagger per icon with spring pop). Approved: 'تمام كويس لحد دلوقتي'.

feedback.element_name: Only 1 big zoom on 85s reel (face conf constraint)
feedback.note: Tried to plan 2 big zooms (14.5s + 46s) but zoom_2 at 46s had face conf 0.41 (below 0.5 min). Moving zoom_2 earlier to the 36.5-40s window (conf 0.76) made it too close to zoom_1 (<30s spacing rule). Had to drop zoom_1 and keep only the single zoom on the trap-reveal moment ('أول قسط هيستحق امتى؟ الشهر الجاي').
feedback.action_taken: Decision was content-first: single zoom on the highest-impact moment is better than two forced zooms. Phase 6.5 filled the retention gap with 4 mini_zooms. Note for future: when face conf is uneven, consider loosening the 30s spacing to 25s for the reel length <90s — or accept 1 big zoom as the norm for short reels.

feedback.note: 'هنبدأ نحسن الفترة الجاية ونقوي الأنميشنز أكتر وننوعها بس حاليا كله مقبول' — Omar accepted the current scenes as a baseline but flagged that animations need to get stronger and more varied going forward. This is the second time he's mentioned animation polish as a next-session focus (same signal from the 'محمد ريان - ورشة الشامل' project two days ago).
feedback.action_taken: Logged as a next-session priority. Concrete directions to explore: (1) more layered motion per element (scale+rotate+glow+shimmer instead of one effect), (2) varied entrance patterns across the 4 scenes (don't use the same spring config for every element), (3) richer background atmosphere (continuous shimmer, particles, or radial pulse), (4) signature 'Omar beats' — maybe an impact flash on scene-open, or a continuous parallax on scene elements.
